subcodes.first_line: I have cast myself, O my God, upon Thy sacred threshold, and pressed my face and brow upon that hallowed court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد القیت نفسی یا الهی علی عتبتک الطاهره و مرغت وجهی و ناصیتی علی تلک الحضره
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
